products.name: Apple
products.description: Fresh red apples, crisp and sweet
products.longDescription: Our premium Red Delicious apples are hand-picked at peak ripeness from sustainable orchards in Washington State. These apples feature a deep red color, crispy texture, and naturally sweet flavor. Perfect for snacking, baking, or adding to salads. Each apple is carefully selected for quality and freshness.
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place or refrigerate for up to 2 weeks

reviews.comment: Absolutely delicious! Crispy and sweet, just perfect.
Great quality apples. A bit pricey but worth it.
Fresh and crunchy! My kids love them.

products.name: Banana
products.description: Ripe yellow bananas, perfect for smoothies
products.longDescription: Premium Cavendish bananas imported from Ecuador's finest plantations. These bananas are picked green and ripened to perfection, ensuring optimal sweetness and texture. Rich in potassium and natural energy, they're perfect for breakfast, pre-workout snacks, or baking.
products.storage: Store at room temperature. Refrigerate to slow ripening

reviews.comment: Perfect ripeness! Great for my morning smoothies.
Good quality, lasted well throughout the week.

products.name: Orange
products.longDescription: Sweet and tangy Valencia oranges from Spain's sun-drenched groves. Known for their exceptional juice content and perfect balance of sweetness and acidity. These oranges are hand-selected for their vibrant color, firm texture, and rich vitamin C content.
products.storage: Store at room temperature for up to 1 week or refrigerate for up to 2 weeks

reviews.comment: Very juicy but wish they were in stock more often!

products.name: Strawberry
products.longDescription: Premium California strawberries, picked at peak ripeness for maximum sweetness and flavor. These plump, ruby-red berries are grown using sustainable farming practices. Perfect for snacking, desserts, salads, or smoothies.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed. Use within 3-5 days for best quality

reviews.comment: The sweetest strawberries I've ever had!
Fresh and delicious. Great for my daughter's lunches.

products.name: Grapes
products.longDescription: Sweet and crispy seedless green grapes from Chile's premium vineyards. Perfect for snacking, fruit salads, or freezing for a healthy treat. Each bunch is carefully selected for sweetness and freshness.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed in original packaging

reviews.comment: Crispy and sweet! Wish they were back in stock.

products.name: Watermelon
products.longDescription: Juicy and refreshing watermelons from Mexico. These premium melons are vine-ripened for maximum sweetness and flavor. Perfect for summer picnics, parties, or as a healthy dessert.
products.storage: Store whole watermelon at room temperature. Refrigerate cut pieces

reviews.comment: So sweet and juicy! Perfect for hot days.

products.name: Mango
products.longDescription: Sweet Alphonso mangoes from India, known as the 'King of Mangoes'. These golden fruits offer rich, creamy flesh with minimal fiber. Perfect for eating fresh, making smoothies, or adding to desserts.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: Best mangoes I've had outside of India!

products.name: Pineapple
products.longDescription: Sweet golden pineapples from Costa Rica. Hand-picked at peak ripeness for optimal sweetness and juiciness. Rich in vitamins and bromelain, perfect for tropical smoothies and grilled dishes.
products.storage: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: Delicious when in stock!

products.name: Blueberries
products.longDescription: Premium organic blueberries from the USA. These antioxidant-rich berries are hand-picked for quality. Perfect for snacking, baking, or adding to breakfast bowls and smoothies.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed. Rinse before eating

reviews.comment: Fresh and plump! Love these for my morning oatmeal.

products.name: Kiwi
products.longDescription: Sweet and tangy kiwis from New Zealand. These fuzzy fruits pack a nutritional punch with high vitamin C content. Perfect for fruit salads, smoothies, or eating fresh.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: Great taste! A little tart but perfect for smoothies.

products.name: Carrots
products.longDescription: Farm-fresh organic carrots from the Netherlands. Sweet, crunchy, and packed with beta-carotene. Perfect for snacking, juicing, or cooking in your favorite recipes.
products.storage: Remove greens and store in refrigerator

reviews.comment: Very fresh and crunchy! Great for carrot sticks.

products.name: Tomatoes
products.longDescription: Vine-ripened Italian tomatoes with rich flavor and perfect texture. Ideal for salads, sauces, and sandwiches. Grown using traditional methods for authentic taste.
products.storage: Store at room temperature until ripe

reviews.comment: Best tomatoes for pasta sauce!

products.name: Broccoli
products.longDescription: Crisp, fresh broccoli crowns from USA farms. This nutrient-dense superfood is perfect for steaming, roasting, or adding to stir-fries. Rich in vitamins and minerals.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Fresh and crisp. Great for roasting!

products.name: Spinach
products.longDescription: Tender baby spinach leaves, pre-washed and ready to eat. Perfect for salads, smoothies, or sautéing. Packed with iron and essential nutrients.
products.storage: Refrigerate in original packaging

reviews.comment: So fresh! Perfect for my morning smoothies.

products.name: Potatoes
products.longDescription: Premium Idaho russet potatoes, perfect for baking, mashing, or making fries. These starchy potatoes have a fluffy texture when cooked and are incredibly versatile.
products.storage: Store in cool, dark, dry place

reviews.comment: Great for baked potatoes! Nice and fluffy.

products.name: Bell Peppers
products.longDescription: Colorful mix of red, yellow, and orange bell peppers from Mexico. Sweet, crunchy, and perfect for salads, stir-fries, or grilling. Each color offers slightly different flavors and nutrients.
products.storage: Refrigerate in crisper drawer

reviews.comment: Love the variety! Perfect for fajitas.

products.name: Cucumber
products.longDescription: Cool, crisp cucumbers from Spain. Perfect for salads, pickling, or making refreshing cucumber water. Low in calories and high in hydration.
products.storage: Refrigerate in crisper drawer

reviews.comment: Crisp and fresh! Great in salads.

products.name: Lettuce
products.longDescription: Fresh, crispy romaine lettuce heads, perfect for Caesar salads or any green salad. Crunchy texture with a mild, slightly sweet flavor.
products.storage: Refrigerate in crisper drawer, wrapped

reviews.comment: Very fresh and crispy! Perfect for salads.

products.name: Onions
products.longDescription: Classic yellow onions, a kitchen essential. These versatile onions are perfect for cooking, caramelizing, or using raw in salads. Strong flavor that mellows when cooked.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry, dark place

reviews.comment: Good quality onions. Last a long time.

products.name: Garlic
products.longDescription: Premium Chinese garlic bulbs with strong, pungent flavor. Essential for countless recipes, garlic adds depth and aroma to any dish. Known for its health benefits.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry place away from light

reviews.comment: Strong and fresh! A must-have in my kitchen.

products.name: Cauliflower
products.longDescription: Fresh white cauliflower heads, perfect for roasting, rice alternatives, or making creamy soups. This versatile vegetable is low in carbs and high in nutrients.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Great for making cauliflower rice!

products.name: Zucchini
products.longDescription: Fresh Italian zucchini, perfect for grilling, spiralizing into noodles, or baking. Mild flavor and tender texture make it incredibly versatile.
products.storage: Refrigerate in crisper drawer

reviews.comment: Perfect for zoodles! Fresh and tender.

products.name: Eggplant
products.longDescription: Glossy purple eggplants from Turkey. Perfect for Mediterranean dishes, grilling, or making baba ganoush. Mild flavor absorbs seasonings beautifully.
products.storage: Store at room temperature, use within 3-5 days

reviews.comment: Great for grilling! Wish it was in stock.

products.name: Sweet Potato
products.longDescription: Naturally sweet orange sweet potatoes from the USA. Rich, creamy texture when cooked. Perfect for baking, mashing, or making fries. High in vitamins and fiber.
products.storage: Store in cool, dark, dry place

reviews.comment: So sweet and delicious! Love making sweet potato fries.

products.name: Mushrooms
products.longDescription: Fresh white button mushrooms from the USA. Versatile and mild-flavored, perfect for sautéing, grilling, or adding to soups and sauces. Pre-cleaned and ready to use.
products.storage: Refrigerate in paper bag

reviews.comment: Fresh mushrooms, great in pasta dishes.

products.name: Green Beans
products.longDescription: Crisp, tender green beans from Kenya. Perfect for steaming, stir-frying, or adding to casseroles. These beans snap easily and have a sweet, fresh flavor.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Very fresh and crisp! Great steamed.

products.name: Asparagus
products.longDescription: Premium green asparagus spears from Peru. Tender tips and crisp stalks perfect for grilling, roasting, or steaming. A springtime delicacy rich in nutrients.
products.storage: Store upright in water in refrigerator

reviews.comment: Delicious when roasted! Hope they restock soon.

products.name: Celery
products.longDescription: Crisp, fresh celery stalks from the USA. Perfect for snacking with dip, adding crunch to salads, or as a base for soups and stocks. Low in calories and refreshing.
products.storage: Refrigerate wrapped in aluminum foil

reviews.comment: Crisp and fresh. Good for snacking.

products.name: Radishes
products.longDescription: Fresh, peppery red radishes from the USA. Crunchy texture with a spicy bite, perfect for salads, garnishes, or pickling. The greens are also edible and nutritious.
products.storage: Remove greens, refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Nice and crisp! Add great crunch to salads.

products.name: Corn
products.longDescription: Fresh sweet corn on the cob from the USA. Picked at peak sweetness, perfect for grilling, boiling, or roasting. Juicy kernels bursting with natural sweetness.
products.storage: Keep husks on, refrigerate

reviews.comment: Super sweet! Perfect grilled with butter.

products.name: Pear
products.longDescription: Juicy Anjou pears from the USA. Sweet, smooth texture perfect for eating fresh or poaching. These pears have a delicate flavor and creamy flesh.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: So juicy and sweet! Can't wait for restock.

products.name: Peach
products.longDescription: Sun-ripened Georgia peaches with sweet, fragrant flesh. These fuzzy fruits are perfect for eating fresh, baking in pies, or making preserves. Peak summer flavor.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: The best peaches! So sweet and juicy.

products.name: Plum
products.longDescription: Sweet-tart purple plums from California. These stone fruits have a perfect balance of sweetness and acidity. Great for snacking or making jams.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: Perfect balance of sweet and tart!

products.name: Cherries
products.longDescription: Premium sweet red cherries from Washington. Hand-picked at peak ripeness for maximum sweetness. Perfect for snacking, baking, or making cherry pies.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed, rinse before eating

reviews.comment: Absolutely delicious! Worth every penny.

products.name: Lemon
products.longDescription: Bright, zesty lemons from Spain. Perfect for adding citrus flavor to drinks, cooking, baking, or making lemonade. High in vitamin C and packed with flavor.
products.storage: Store at room temperature or refrigerate

reviews.comment: So juicy! Perfect for lemonade.

products.name: Lime
products.longDescription: Tart, aromatic Mexican limes. Essential for cocktails, marinades, and Mexican cuisine. These small limes pack intense citrus flavor and fragrance.
products.storage: Store at room temperature or refrigerate

reviews.comment: Perfect for margaritas! Hope they restock.

products.name: Grapefruit
products.longDescription: Sweet-tart pink grapefruit from Florida. These beautiful citrus fruits are perfect for breakfast, juicing, or adding to salads. Rich in vitamin C and lycopene.
products.storage: Store at room temperature or refrigerate

reviews.comment: Nice and sweet for grapefruit! Love it for breakfast.

products.name: Avocado
products.longDescription: Creamy Hass avocados from Mexico. Rich, buttery texture perfect for guacamole, toast, salads, or eating fresh. High in healthy fats and nutrients.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: Perfect ripeness! Great for avocado toast.

products.name: Papaya
products.longDescription: Sweet Hawaiian papaya with vibrant orange flesh. Rich in papain enzyme and vitamins. Perfect for breakfast, smoothies, or tropical fruit salads.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: So sweet and ripe! Love the flavor.

products.name: Dragon Fruit
products.longDescription: Vibrant pink dragon fruit from Vietnam. This exotic fruit has white flesh dotted with black seeds and a mildly sweet flavor. Rich in antioxidants and fiber.
products.storage: Store at room temperature until ripe, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: So beautiful and delicious! Can't wait for restock.

products.name: Pomegranate
products.longDescription: Jewel-like pomegranates from Turkey. Packed with antioxidant-rich arils (seeds) that burst with sweet-tart flavor. Perfect for snacking, juicing, or garnishing dishes.
products.storage: Store whole at room temperature or refrigerate

reviews.comment: Delicious arils! Love the sweet-tart taste.

products.name: Coconut
products.longDescription: Fresh Thai coconuts with sweet water and tender meat. Perfect for drinking coconut water or using the meat in cooking and baking. Naturally hydrating.
products.storage: Store whole coconut at room temperature

reviews.comment: Fresh coconut water! Great post-workout drink.

products.name: Blackberries
products.longDescription: Plump, juicy blackberries from the USA. Sweet-tart flavor perfect for snacking, baking, or adding to breakfast. High in fiber and antioxidants.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed, rinse before eating

reviews.comment: So fresh and juicy! Perfect for my yogurt.

products.name: Raspberries
products.longDescription: Delicate red raspberries from the USA. These fragrant berries are perfect for desserts, jams, or eating fresh. High in antioxidants and vitamin C.
products.storage: Refrigerate unwashed, very delicate

reviews.comment: Best raspberries ever! Hope they restock soon.

products.name: Cantaloupe
products.longDescription: Juicy cantaloupe melons from the USA. Sweet orange flesh with a musky aroma. Perfect for breakfast, fruit salads, or as a refreshing snack.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: Sweet and juicy! Perfect for breakfast.

products.name: Honeydew Melon
products.longDescription: Sweet honeydew melons with pale green flesh. Mild, refreshing flavor perfect for fruit salads or eating fresh. Hydrating and delicious.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: Mild and sweet. Love it chilled!

products.name: Figs
products.longDescription: Delicate fresh figs from Greece. Sweet, honey-like flavor with soft, jammy texture. Perfect for cheese boards, salads, or eating fresh.
products.storage: Refrigerate ripe figs, very perishable

reviews.comment: Absolutely divine! Can't wait for them to be back.

products.name: Dates
products.longDescription: Premium Medjool dates from Morocco. These 'king of dates' are large, soft, and incredibly sweet. Perfect for snacking, baking, or natural sweetening.
products.storage: Store in airtight container at room temperature

reviews.comment: Best dates! So soft and sweet.

products.name: Apricot
products.longDescription: Sweet Turkish apricots with velvety skin and juicy flesh. Perfect balance of sweet and tart. Great for snacking, baking, or making preserves.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: So fresh and flavorful! Love them.

products.name: Nectarine
products.longDescription: Smooth-skinned California nectarines. Like peaches but without the fuzz. Juicy, sweet, and perfect for eating fresh or grilling.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when ripe

reviews.comment: Perfectly ripe and sweet! Delicious.

products.name: Passion Fruit
products.longDescription: Aromatic Brazilian passion fruits with tart, tropical flavor. Scoop out the seeds and pulp for an intense flavor experience. Perfect for desserts and drinks.
products.storage: Store at room temperature until wrinkled, then refrigerate

reviews.comment: Amazing flavor! So aromatic and delicious.

products.name: Lychee
products.longDescription: Exotic Chinese lychees with translucent white flesh. Sweet, floral flavor with a grape-like texture. Perfect for snacking or adding to cocktails.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: So sweet and refreshing! Love these.

products.name: Persimmon
products.longDescription: Sweet Fuyu persimmons from Japan. Crisp when firm, soft and honey-sweet when ripe. Eat like an apple or slice for salads and desserts.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when soft

reviews.comment: Sweet and delicious! Love eating them crisp.

products.name: Guava
products.longDescription: Aromatic Indian guavas with pink flesh. Tropical flavor combining strawberry and pear notes. Perfect for juicing or eating fresh with a sprinkle of salt.
products.storage: Ripen at room temperature, refrigerate when soft

reviews.comment: Reminds me of home! So aromatic and delicious.

products.name: Star Fruit
products.longDescription: Unique star-shaped carambola from Malaysia. Crisp texture with sweet-tart flavor. Perfect for garnishing drinks and dishes or eating fresh.
products.storage: Store at room temperature or refrigerate

reviews.comment: So pretty! Adds elegance to any dish.

products.name: Cabbage
products.longDescription: Fresh green cabbage from the USA. Crisp, mild-flavored leaves perfect for coleslaw, stir-fries, or fermenting into sauerkraut. Very affordable and versatile.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Great for coleslaw! Fresh and crisp.

products.name: Red Cabbage
products.longDescription: Vibrant purple-red cabbage from the USA. Slightly sweeter and more peppery than green cabbage. Perfect for adding color to salads and slaws.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Beautiful color! Great for slaws.

products.name: Kale
products.longDescription: Nutrient-dense curly kale from the USA. This superfood is perfect for salads, smoothies, or sautéing. Packed with vitamins and minerals.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Love kale! Perfect for my green smoothies.

products.name: Swiss Chard
products.longDescription: Beautiful rainbow Swiss chard from the USA. Colorful stems and nutritious greens. Mild, slightly earthy flavor perfect for sautéing or adding to soups.
products.storage: Refrigerate wrapped in damp paper towel

reviews.comment: So colorful! Wish it was in stock.

products.name: Arugula
products.longDescription: Fresh, peppery arugula from the USA. This gourmet green adds a spicy kick to salads and sandwiches. Perfect for topping pizzas or mixing with milder greens.
products.storage: Refrigerate in container

reviews.comment: Love the peppery kick! Perfect for salads.

products.name: Beets
products.longDescription: Earthy sweet red beets from the USA. Perfect for roasting, pickling, or juicing. These nutrient-packed roots add vibrant color and nutrition to any dish.
products.storage: Remove greens, store in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Great for roasting! Sweet and earthy.

products.name: Turnips
products.longDescription: Fresh white turnips from the USA. Mild, slightly sweet flavor when cooked. Perfect for mashing, roasting, or adding to stews. The greens are also edible.
products.storage: Remove greens, refrigerate

reviews.comment: Good for mashing! Milder than expected.

products.name: Parsnips
products.longDescription: Sweet, nutty parsnips from the UK. These cream-colored root vegetables become wonderfully sweet when roasted. Perfect for winter dishes and roasts.
products.storage: Remove greens, refrigerate

reviews.comment: So sweet when roasted! Love these.

products.name: Butternut Squash
products.longDescription: Sweet, nutty butternut squash from the USA. Perfect for soups, roasting, or stuffing. The smooth texture and sweet flavor make it a fall favorite.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry place

reviews.comment: Perfect for soup! So creamy and sweet.

products.name: Acorn Squash
products.longDescription: Dark green acorn squash from the USA. Sweet, slightly fibrous flesh perfect for stuffing or roasting. A classic winter squash variety.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry place

reviews.comment: Great stuffed! Classic winter squash.

products.name: Pumpkin
products.longDescription: Sweet sugar pumpkins from the USA. Perfect for pies, soups, and baking. Much sweeter and less stringy than carving pumpkins.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry place

reviews.comment: Perfect for pumpkin pie! So sweet.

products.name: Leeks
products.longDescription: Mild, sweet leeks from France. These elegant alliums add subtle onion flavor to soups, quiches, and braises. The white and light green parts are most tender.
products.storage: Refrigerate wrapped in plastic

reviews.comment: Essential for French cooking! Hope they restock.

products.name: Shallots
products.longDescription: Delicate French shallots with complex, sweet-savory flavor. Perfect for sauces, vinaigrettes, and refined cooking. More subtle than onions, more flavorful than scallions.
products.storage: Store in cool, dry place

reviews.comment: Perfect for vinaigrettes! Much better than onions.

products.name: Ginger Root
products.longDescription: Aromatic fresh ginger from China. Spicy, warming flavor essential for Asian cooking, teas, and baking. Known for its digestive and anti-inflammatory properties.
products.storage: Refrigerate or freeze for longer storage

reviews.comment: So fresh and spicy! Perfect for stir-fries.

products.name: Turmeric Root
products.longDescription: Vibrant orange turmeric root from India. Earthy, slightly bitter flavor with powerful anti-inflammatory properties. Essential for curries and golden milk.
products.storage: Refrigerate or freeze

reviews.comment: Fresh turmeric is so much better! Love it.

products.name: Okra
products.longDescription: Fresh green okra pods from India. Mild flavor with unique texture. Perfect for gumbo, stir-fries, or roasting. When cooked properly, it's delicious and not slimy.
products.storage: Refrigerate in paper bag

reviews.comment: Love okra! Hope it comes back soon.

products.name: Artichoke
products.longDescription: Premium California globe artichokes. Elegant vegetable with meaty heart and tender leaves. Perfect for steaming and serving with butter or aioli.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Delicious steamed with butter! Worth the effort.

products.name: Brussels Sprouts
products.longDescription: Fresh Belgian Brussels sprouts on the stalk. These miniature cabbages are perfect for roasting until crispy. Sweet and nutty when cooked properly.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Roasted with bacon - amazing! So good.

products.name: Bok Choy
products.longDescription: Tender baby bok choy from China. Mild, slightly sweet Chinese cabbage perfect for stir-fries and soups. Both leaves and stalks are delicious.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Perfect for stir-fries! So tender and fresh.

products.name: Fennel
products.longDescription: Crisp Italian fennel with delicate anise flavor. The bulb can be sliced raw for salads or roasted. The fronds make a beautiful garnish.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Love the anise flavor! Great roasted.

products.name: Radicchio
products.longDescription: Vibrant Italian radicchio with beautiful burgundy leaves. Pleasantly bitter flavor that adds color and sophistication to salads. Can also be grilled.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Perfect bitterness! Beautiful in salads.

products.name: Endive
products.longDescription: Elegant Belgian endive with crisp, slightly bitter leaves. Perfect for appetizers filled with cheese or seafood, or adding crunch to salads.
products.storage: Refrigerate wrapped in damp paper towel

reviews.comment: Perfect for appetizers! Very elegant.

products.name: Watercress
products.longDescription: Peppery watercress from the UK. This aquatic green has a spicy, mustard-like flavor. Perfect for sandwiches, salads, or as a soup garnish.
products.storage: Store in water like flowers, refrigerate

reviews.comment: Love the peppery kick! Great in sandwiches.

products.name: Snap Peas
products.longDescription: Crisp, sweet sugar snap peas from the USA. Eat the entire pod for a crunchy, refreshing snack. Perfect raw or lightly stir-fried.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: So crunchy and sweet! Perfect for snacking.

products.name: Snow Peas
products.longDescription: Tender Chinese snow peas with flat, edible pods. Sweet and delicate, perfect for stir-fries. The entire pod is edible and delicious.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Love these in stir-fries! So tender.

products.name: Jalapeno Peppers
products.longDescription: Medium-heat jalapeño peppers from Mexico. Perfect for salsas, nachos, or pickling. Remove seeds for milder heat or leave them in for extra spice.
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: Perfect heat level! Great for salsas.

products.name: Habanero Peppers
products.longDescription: Fiery Mexican habanero peppers with fruity flavor and intense heat. Use sparingly in sauces and marinades. Handle with care!
products.storage: Refrigerate in plastic bag

reviews.comment: So hot but so good! Amazing flavor.

products.name: Chili Peppers
products.longDescription: Bright red Thai chili peppers with searing heat. Essential for Asian cuisine and hot sauces. Small but mighty in flavor and spice.
products.storage: Refrigerate or freeze for longer storage

reviews.comment: Perfect heat for Thai cooking! Love them.

products.name: Cherry Tomatoes
products.longDescription: Sweet Italian cherry tomatoes bursting with flavor. Perfect for snacking, salads, or roasting. These bite-sized tomatoes are sweeter than regular tomatoes.
products.storage: Store at room temperature for best flavor

reviews.comment: So sweet! Can't wait for them to restock.

products.name: Grape Tomatoes
products.longDescription: Tiny, sweet grape tomatoes from the USA. Even sweeter than cherry tomatoes with an oval shape. Perfect for kids' lunches and easy snacking.
products.storage: Store at room temperature

reviews.comment: My kids love these! So sweet and perfect size.
